<script>
wf.ready(() => {
// Function to opt in or out based on consent preferences
const handleWebflowAnalyticsConsent = () => {
try {
// Logic to check consent groups from the OneTrust cookie (OptanonConsent)
const otCookieKey = 'OptanonConsent=';
const otCookieRow = document.cookie.split('; ').find(row => row.startsWith(otCookieKey));
if (!otCookieRow) {
throw new Error('OneTrust cookie (OptanonConsent) not found.');
}
// Extract and decode the OptanonConsent value
const otCookieValue = otCookieRow.substring(otCookieKey.length);
const decoded = decodeURIComponent(otCookieValue);
// Cookie structure includes: ...&groups=C0003:1,C0001:1,C0004:1,...&...
const groupsKey = 'groups=';
const groupsPart = decoded.split('&').find(part => part.startsWith(groupsKey));
if (!groupsPart) {
throw new Error('groups field not found in OptanonConsent cookie.');
}
const groupsValue = groupsPart.substring(groupsKey.length); // e.g. "C0003:1,C0001:1,C0004:1,..."
const REQUIRED_GROUP = 'C0004:1';
// Check for C0004 opted-in
const hasOptedIn = groupsValue.split(',').includes(REQUIRED_GROUP);
// Adjust Webflow Analytics opt-in/out based on consent
if (hasOptedIn) {
wf.allowUserTracking();
} else {
wf.denyUserTracking();
}
} catch (e) {
console.error('Error handling OneTrust consent:', e);
}
};
// Set up the OneTrust consent change listener to check when preferences change
if (typeof OneTrust !== 'undefined' && OneTrust.OnConsentChanged) {
OneTrust.OnConsentChanged(() => {
handleWebflowAnalyticsConsent();
});
}
// Initial check when the page loads
handleWebflowAnalyticsConsent();
});
</script>

  });
</script>

class="line-eyebrow-heading-group"><div class="max-width-large"><div data-w-id="f6b1a2ae-0ae8-95a7-06e4-0c5d07b1a137" class="line-white"></div><div class="spacer-small"></div><div <rect width="8" height="8" fill="currentColor"/>
</svg></div><div class="text-eyebrow">The challenge</div><div class="eyebrow-reveal-div"></div></div><div class="spacer-small"></div><div class="heading_highlight-wrap"><h2 class="display-inline">Multi-cloud investigations are manual and slow, and data disappears fast</h2></div></div></div></div><div id="w-node-_6c852d13-6b2f-7356-f6bd-5129791c2c54-791c2c4c" class="stats31-products_card-wrap"><div data-w-id="6c852d13-6b2f-7356-f6bd-5129791c2c55" class="stats31-products_card"><div class="heading-style-h1">1/3rd</div><div class="spacer-xsmall"></div><div>of alerts in cloud environments do not get investigated due to lack of information</div><div class="spacer-xxsmall"></div><div class="text-size-tiny"></div></div><div data-w-id="6c852d13-6b2f-7356-f6bd-5129791c2c5e" class="stats31-products_card"><div class="heading-style-h1">89%</div><div class="spacer-xsmall"></div><div>of organizations suffer damage before containing and investigating incidents</div><div class="spacer-xxsmall"></div><div class="text-size-tiny">Darktrace&#x27;s report: &quot;Organizations require a new approach to handle investigations and response in the cloud&quot;</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="glow-banner is-center is-stats"></div></section><div class="hide"><section animate-body-to="1" class="section_copy-glow-products"><div class="z-index-2"><div class="padding-global"><div class="container-small"><div class="padding-section-large"><div class="copy-glow-products"><div class="z-index-2"><div class="spacer-small"></div><h3 data-w-id="985e1faa-4189-14c5-ba21-a4c5265707e1" class="heading-style-h2">Introducing forensics at the speed of cloud</h3></div><img loading="lazy" src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/626ff19cdd07d1258d49238d/66a255359d36000d78330299_copy-glow-products_trace.png" alt="" class="copy-glow-products_trace"/></div></div></div></div></div><div class="glow-banner is-bottom"></div></section></div><section class="section_accordion-image"><div class="padding-global"><div class="container-large"><div class="padding-section-large"><div class="w-layout-grid accordion-image_component"><div id="w-node-f5874717-a827-4171-3be8-c03d2ab13997-2ab13992" class="line-black"></div><h2 class="heading-style-h3">Cloud-native forensics, designed for scale </h2><p></p></div><div class="spacer-medium"></div><div class="accordion-image_list-content-bottom"><div class="accordion-1"><div class="accordion-image_accordion"><div data-w-id="f5874717-a827-4171-3be8-c03d2ab139a5" class="accordion-image_question"><div class="heading-style-h6">Automated data capture across your business</div><div class="accordion-image_icon-wrapper"><div class="icon-embed-xxsmall w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 </svg></div></div></div><div class="accordion-image_answer"><p>Integrates with any alert source and deploys via API to enable fast, low-overhead response within existing workflows.  </p><div class="spacer-small"></div><div id="w-node-_25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951d-81e3951d" class="button-group"></div></div></div></div><div class="accordion-2"><div class="accordion-image_accordion"><div data-w-id="cacf1e65-5620-589e-b13c-6925501d0ef1" class="accordion-image_question"><div class="heading-style-h6">Support containers and ephemeral assets</div><div class="accordion-image_icon-wrapper"><div class="icon-embed-xxsmall w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 8 7" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></div></div><div class="accordion-image_answer"><p>Leverage automation to ensure incident data is captured and preserved before it disappears. Automatically collect key data sources and memory from individual processes for forensic analysis.</p><div class="spacer-small"></div><div id="w-node-_25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951d-81e3951d" class="button-group"></div></div></div></div><div class="accordion-3"><div class="accordion-image_accordion"><div data-w-id="e043d9bb-ead4-21f0-255e-553b02d9aecb" class="accordion-image_question"><div class="heading-style-h6">Parallel collection and processing</div><div class="accordion-image_icon-wrapper"><div class="icon-embed-xxsmall w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 8 7" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></div></div></div></div></div></section><div><header data-w-id="b6e83732-42a9-1d62-6995-bc1d3e3cb666" class="section_header144"></header><header class="section_header15"><div class="padding-global"><div class="container-large"><div class="padding-section-large"><div class="header15_component"><div class="margin-bottom margin-xxlarge"><div class="w-layout-grid header15_content-wrapper"><div class="header15_content-left"><h1 class="heading-style-h3">From Days of Manual Work to Minutes with Automation </h1></div><div class="header15_content-right"><p class="text-size-regular">Simplify a process that today involves multiple tickets, requests for access, manual evidence collection, and hours of analysis. </p><div class="margin-top margin-medium"></div></div></div></div><div class="header15_image-wrapper"><div class="fai-diagram_wrapper"><a href="#" class="w-inline-block w-lightbox"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/626ff19cdd07d1258d49238d/68d40c46761a91dc3ce919fa_FAI%20diagram.avif" loading="lazy" alt=""/><script type="application/json" class="w-json">{

<rect width="8" height="8" fill="currentColor"/>
</svg></div><div class="text-eyebrow">Use cases</div><div class="eyebrow-reveal-div"></div></div><h2 class="heading-style-h3">Empowers organizations to respond to threats faster</h2><p>Better understand risk across complex environments, reduce MTTR, and rapidly deploy with this first-of-its-kind technology</p></div><div class="accordion-image_list-content-bottom"><div class="accordion-1"><div class="accordion-image_accordion"><div data-w-id="d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c86f" class="image-accordion_question"><div class="heading-style-h6">SOC triage</div><div class="image-accordion_icon-wrapper"><div class="icon-embed-xxsmall w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 8 7" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<g clip-path="url(#clip0_412_1377)">
<path d="M8 1.83266L4.30147 5.52976L3.70588 5.52976L-2.42933e-08 1.83266L0.727941 1.10644L3.47059 3.84259L4.53676 3.84259L7.27941 1.10645L8 1.83266Z" fill="#FF6B00"/>
</g>
<defs>
<clipPath id="clip0_412_1377">
<rect x="8" y="0.318115" width="6" height="8" rx="3" transform="rotate(90 8 0.318115)" fill="white"/>
</clipPath>
</defs>
</svg></div></div></div><div class="image-accordion_answer"><p data-w-id="d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c875">Get immediate insights into malicious activity, saving analysts precious time during event triage. Perform automated triage of acquisitions of endpoint resources to gain deeper context in a shorter period of time. </p><div class="spacer-small"></div><div id="w-node-_25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951d-81e3951d" class="button-group"><a data-w-id="25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951e" data-wf-native-id-path="316b3782-3c35-eeda-b71d-c96784afa320:d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c878:25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951e" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951e" data-wf-component-context="%5B%7B%22componentId%22%3A%22d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c85c%22%2C%22instanceId%22%3A%22316b3782-3c35-eeda-b71d-c96784afa320%22%7D%2C%7B%22componentId%22%3A%2225025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951d%22%2C%22instanceId%22%3A%22d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c878%22%7D%5D" href="https://www.darktrace.com/resources/demo-of-darktrace-forensic-acquisition-investigation-soc-triage" target="_blank" class="button is-tertiary is-icon w-inline-block"><div>See in action</div><div class="button_embed-wrap"><div class="icon-embed-xxsmall w-embed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 21 16" fill="none">
  <path d="M12.8078 0L20.202 7.39706V8.58824L12.8078 16L11.3554 14.5441L16.8277 9.05882H0V6.92647H16.8277L11.3554 1.44118L12.8078 0Z" fill="#FF6B00"/>
</svg></div></div></a></div></div></div></div><div class="accordion-2"><div class="accordion-image_accordion"><div data-w-id="d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c87a" class="image-accordion_question"><div class="heading-style-h6">Cross-cloud investigations</div><div class="image-accordion_icon-wrapper"><div data-w-id="d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c87e" class="icon-embed-xxsmall w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 8 7" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</g>

</clipPath>
</defs>
</svg></div></div></div><div class="image-accordion_answer"><p>Investigate incidents identified in any cloud environment in a single solution. Findings are unified in one timeline to allow seamless investigation and response.</p><div class="spacer-small"></div><div id="w-node-_25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951d-81e3951d" class="button-group"></div></div></div></div><div class="accordion-3"><div class="accordion-image_accordion"><div data-w-id="d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c885" class="image-accordion_question"><div class="heading-style-h6">Container &amp; K8 investigations</div><div class="image-accordion_icon-wrapper"><div class="icon-embed-xxsmall w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 8 7" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</defs>
</svg></div></div></div><div class="image-accordion_answer"><p>Perform investigation and response in ephemeral environments, leveraging automation to ensure incident data is captured and preserved before it disappears.</p><div class="spacer-small"></div><div id="w-node-_25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951d-81e3951d" class="button-group"><a data-w-id="25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951e" data-wf-native-id-path="316b3782-3c35-eeda-b71d-c96784afa320:d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c88e:25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951e" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951e" data-wf-component-context="%5B%7B%22componentId%22%3A%22d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c85c%22%2C%22instanceId%22%3A%22316b3782-3c35-eeda-b71d-c96784afa320%22%7D%2C%7B%22componentId%22%3A%2225025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951d%22%2C%22instanceId%22%3A%22d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c88e%22%7D%5D" href="https://www.darktrace.com/resources/demo-of-darktrace-forensic-acquisition-investigation-container-investigations" target="_blank" class="button is-tertiary is-icon w-inline-block"><div>See in action</div><div class="button_embed-wrap"><div class="icon-embed-xxsmall w-embed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 21 16" fill="none">
  <path d="M12.8078 0L20.202 7.39706V8.58824L12.8078 16L11.3554 14.5441L16.8277 9.05882H0V6.92647H16.8277L11.3554 1.44118L12.8078 0Z" fill="#FF6B00"/>
</svg></div></div></a></div></div></div></div><div class="accordion-4"><div class="accordion-image_accordion"><div data-w-id="d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c890" class="image-accordion_question"><div class="heading-style-h6">SaaS investigations</div><div class="image-accordion_icon-wrapper"><div class="icon-embed-xxsmall w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 8 7" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></div></div><div class="image-accordion_answer"><p>Investigate key SaaS logs, alongside other sources captured across on-premises and cloud assets to gain a better understanding of the scope and impact of malicious activity. </p><div class="spacer-small"></div><div id="w-node-_25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951d-81e3951d" class="button-group"></div></div></div></div><div class="accordion-5"><div class="accordion-image_accordion"><div data-w-id="d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c89b" class="image-accordion_question"><div class="heading-style-h6">Cloud detection &amp; response</div><div class="image-accordion_icon-wrapper"><div class="icon-embed-xxsmall w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 8 7" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<g clip-path="url(#clip0_412_1377)">
<path d="M8 1.83266L4.30147 5.52976L3.70588 5.52976L-2.42933e-08 1.83266L0.727941 1.10644L3.47059 3.84259L4.53676 3.84259L7.27941 1.10645L8 1.83266Z" fill="#FF6B00"/>
</g>

<clipPath id="clip0_412_1377">
<rect x="8" y="0.318115" width="6" height="8" rx="3" transform="rotate(90 8 0.318115)" fill="white"/>
</clipPath>
</defs>
</svg></div></div></div><div class="image-accordion_answer"><p>Marry threat detection with automated collection and investigation - with critical forensic-level context - to expedite response to cloud threats as soon as malicious activity is detected.  </p><div class="spacer-small"></div><div id="w-node-_25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951d-81e3951d" class="button-group"><a data-w-id="25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951e" data-wf-native-id-path="316b3782-3c35-eeda-b71d-c96784afa320:d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c8a4:25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951e" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951e" data-wf-component-context="%5B%7B%22componentId%22%3A%22d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c85c%22%2C%22instanceId%22%3A%22316b3782-3c35-eeda-b71d-c96784afa320%22%7D%2C%7B%22componentId%22%3A%2225025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951d%22%2C%22instanceId%22%3A%22d8669725-51a6-4f79-806c-52bd3588c8a4%22%7D%5D" href="https://www.darktrace.com/resources/demo-of-darktrace-forensic-acquisition-investigation-cloud-detection-response" target="_blank" class="button is-tertiary is-icon w-inline-block"><div>See in action</div><div class="button_embed-wrap"><div class="icon-embed-xxsmall w-embed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 21 16" fill="none">
  <path d="M12.8078 0L20.202 7.39706V8.58824L12.8078 16L11.3554 14.5441L16.8277 9.05882H0V6.92647H16.8277L11.3554 1.44118L12.8078 0Z" fill="#FF6B00"/>
</svg></div></div></a></div></div></div></div><div class="accordion-6"><div class="accordion-image_accordion"><div data-w-id="5034cd5f-f129-11e4-42d0-5a0ed35b00d8" class="image-accordion_question"><div class="heading-style-h6">Evidence preservation</div><div class="image-accordion_icon-wrapper"><div class="icon-embed-xxsmall w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 8 7" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</g>

<clipPath id="clip0_412_1377">
<rect x="8" y="0.318115" width="6" height="8" rx="3" transform="rotate(90 8 0.318115)" fill="white"/>
</clipPath>
</defs>
</svg></div></div></div><div class="image-accordion_answer"><p>Automate the collection, processing, analysis, and preservation of evidence so it’s accessible to all teams when needed, every time – before it disappears. </p><div class="spacer-small"></div><div id="w-node-_25025ac5-0f2d-0d8e-2d63-5b3181e3951d-81e3951d" class="button-group"></div></div></div></div><div class="spacer-medium"></div><div class="button-group"></div></div></div><div class="accordion-image_image-wrapper"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/626ff19cdd07d1258d49238d/6875000a0496d33f9c801d0f_GettyImages-1481370371.jpg" loading="lazy" alt="" sizes="100vw" srcset="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/626ff19cdd07d1258d49238d/6875000a0496d33f9c801d0f_GettyImages-1481370371-p-500.jpg 500w, https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/626ff19cdd07d1258d49238d/6875000a0496d33f9c801d0f_GettyImages-1481370371-p-800.jpg 800w, https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/626ff19cdd07d1258d49238d/6875000a0496d33f9c801d0f_GettyImages-1481370371-p-1080.jpg 1080w, https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/626ff19cdd07d1258d49238d/6875000a0496d33f9c801d0f_GettyImages-1481370371-p-1600.jpg 1600w, https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/626ff19cdd07d1258d49238d/6875000a0496d33f9c801d0f_GettyImages-1481370371-p-2000.jpg 2000w, https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/626ff19cdd07d1258d49238d/6875000a0496d33f9c801d0f_GettyImages-1481370371-p-2600.jpg 2600w, https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/626ff19cdd07d1258d49238d/6875000a0496d33f9c801d0f_GettyImages-1481370371-p-3200.jpg 3200w, https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/626ff19cdd07d1258d49238d/6875000a0496d33f9c801d0f_GettyImages-1481370371.jpg 5120w" class="accordion-image_image"/><div class="glow-banner is-image-copy"></div><div class="trace_image-copy is-top-left w-embed"><svg width="135" height="142" viewBox="0 0 135 142" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div><div class="footer11_link-text">/ Incident Readiness &amp; Recovery</div></a></div><div class="footer11_link-list"><div class="footer_label"><div>Services</div></div><a data-w-id="759eb2ad-d464-6953-6db2-cd2ec962225c" data-wf-native-id-path="5986df66-2d1f-3b33-8076-c9d45db61b45:759eb2ad-d464-6953-6db2-cd2ec962225c" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="759eb2ad-d464-6953-6db2-cd2ec962225c" data-wf-component-context="%5B%7B%22componentId%22%3A%2253eb7747-8349-6156-0da6-5e066c225786%22%2C%22instanceId%22%3A%225986df66-2d1f-3b33-8076-c9d45db61b45%22%7D%5D" href="/services" class="footer11_link w-inline-block"><div class="icon-embed-custom is-footer w-embed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 8 8" fill="none" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" aria-hidden="true" role="img">

<script>
const queryString = window.location.search;
  const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(queryString);
  const params = ['utm_campaign', 'utm_source', 'utm_content', 'utm_medium', 'utm_term', 'utm_id'];
  let url_additions = "";

  for (let param of params) {
    let paramData = urlParams.get(param) || localStorage.getItem(param) || "-";
    if (paramData) {
      if (paramData != "-") {
        url_additions += param + "=" + paramData + "&";
      }
      localStorage.setItem(param, paramData);

      // Select the form input by ID and set its value if it exists
      const inputElement = document.getElementById(param);
      if (inputElement) {
        inputElement.value = paramData;
      }
    }
  }

  url_additions = url_additions.slice(0, -1);  
  

const links = document.querySelectorAll('a');
links.forEach(link => {
    if ((link.href.includes('novalue') || link.href.includes('/virtual-innovation-launch')) && !link.href.includes('#')) {
        link.href = link.href + (link.href.includes('?') ? '&' : '?') + url_additions;
    }
});

}, { "name": "Aland Islands", "code": "AX" }, { "name": "Curacao", "code": "CW" }, { "name": "Democratic Republic of the Congo", "code": "CD" }, { "name": "Jersey", "code": "JE" }, { "name": "Isle of "Sint Maarten", "code": "SX" }, { "name": "Bonaire, Saint Eustatius and Saba", "code": "BQ" }, { "name": "South Sudan", "code": "SS" }, { "name": "Serbia and Montenegro", "code": "CS" }, { "name": "Saint Barthelemy", "code": "BL" } ]

    for(var c = 0; c<countries.length; c++) {
            if(c == 0){
        $('[id^='+whereto+']').append('<option value>' + countries[c].name + '</option>');

            }else{
        $('[id^='+whereto+']').append('<option value="' + countries[c].code + '">' + countries[c].name + '</option>');
            }
    }
}
 function addStates(whereto) {
    let states = [
      { "name": "", "code": "none" },
      { "name": "Alabama", "code": "AL" }, { "name": "Alaska", "code": "AK" }, { "name": "Arizona", "code": "AZ" },
      { "name": "Arkansas", "code": "AR" }, { "name": "California", "code": "CA" }, { "name": "Colorado", "code": "CO" },
      { "name": "Connecticut", "code": "CT" }, { "name": "Delaware", "code": "DE" }, { "name": "Florida", "code": "FL" },
      { "name": "Georgia", "code": "GA" }, { "name": "Hawaii", "code": "HI" }, { "name": "Idaho", "code": "ID" },
      { "name": "Illinois", "code": "IL" }, { "name": "Indiana", "code": "IN" }, { "name": "Iowa", "code": "IA" },
      { "name": "Kansas", "code": "KS" }, { "name": "Kentucky", "code": "KY" }, { "name": "Louisiana", "code": "LA" },
      { "name": "Maine", "code": "ME" }, { "name": "Maryland", "code": "MD" }, { "name": "Massachusetts", "code": "MA" },
      { "name": "Michigan", "code": "MI" }, { "name": "Minnesota", "code": "MN" }, { "name": "Mississippi", "code": "MS" },
      { "name": "Missouri", "code": "MO" }, { "name": "Montana", "code": "MT" }, { "name": "Nebraska", "code": "NE" },
      { "name": "Nevada", "code": "NV" }, { "name": "New Hampshire", "code": "NH" }, { "name": "New Jersey", "code": "NJ" },
      { "name": "New Mexico", "code": "NM" }, { "name": "New York", "code": "NY" }, { "name": "North Carolina", "code": "NC" },
      { "name": "North Dakota", "code": "ND" }, { "name": "Ohio", "code": "OH" }, { "name": "Oklahoma", "code": "OK" },
      { "name": "Oregon", "code": "OR" }, { "name": "Pennsylvania", "code": "PA" }, { "name": "Rhode Island", "code": "RI" },
      { "name": "South Carolina", "code": "SC" }, { "name": "South Dakota", "code": "SD" }, { "name": "Tennessee", "code": "TN" },
      { "name": "Texas", "code": "TX" }, { "name": "Utah", "code": "UT" }, { "name": "Vermont", "code": "VT" },
      { "name": "Virginia", "code": "VA" }, { "name": "Washington", "code": "WA" }, { "name": "West Virginia", "code": "WV" },
      { "name": "Wisconsin", "code": "WI" }, { "name": "Wyoming", "code": "WY" }
    ];
    
    // Populate the state dropdown
    for (var c = 0; c < states.length; c++) {
      if (c == 0) {
        $('[id=' + whereto + ']').append('<option value="-" selected>' + states[c].name + '</option>');
      } else {
        $('[id=' + whereto + ']').append('<option value="' + states[c].code + '">' + states[c].name + '</option>');
      }
    }
  }

  // Add states to any select with ID 'state' by default
  addStates('state');
  addCountries('country');

  // Function to handle change in country selection
  function handleCountryChange(event) {
    const countryValue = event.target.value;
    const stateElements = document.querySelectorAll('#state, [id$="-State"]'); // Selects all states including generic and form specific
    const stateBlockElements = document.querySelectorAll('#state-block, [id$="-State-Block"]'); // Selects all state blocks

    if (countryValue === "US") {
      stateBlockElements.forEach(element => element.style.display = "block");
      stateElements.forEach(element => element.value = null);
    } else {
      stateBlockElements.forEach(element => element.style.display = "none");
      stateElements.forEach(element => {
        element.required = false;
        element.selectedIndex = 0;
        element.value = "-";
      });
    }
  }

  // Attach event listener to any country dropdowns with ID 'country' or ending with '-Country'
  document.querySelectorAll('#country, [id$="-Country"]').forEach(countryElement => {
    countryElement.addEventListener('change', handleCountryChange);
  });

  // Webflow specific code to add states to forms listed in the array
  let forms = [
    "Start-Free-Trial", "Main-Form", "Nav-Get-a-Demo", "Primary-CTA-Free-Trial", 
    "Primary-CTA-Get-a-Demo", "Contact-Page", "Featured-Resource", "Whitepaper-Resource", 
    "Resource-Page", "Specific-Event-Form", "Specific-Resource"
  ];

  Webflow.push(function () {
    forms.forEach(form => {
      addCountries(form + "-Country");
      addStates(form + "-State");
    });
  });

  // Attach event listeners to all country dropdowns related to the forms listed
  forms.forEach((form) => {
    const countrySelector = `#${form}-Country`;
    document.querySelectorAll(countrySelector).forEach(countryElement => {
      countryElement.addEventListener("change", handleCountryChange);
    });
  });
var form = document.getElementById("main_form_2");
var url = window.location.pathname;
if (form){
  var field = form.querySelector("#Message");
  if(url === "/contact") {
    field.classList.remove('hidden')
  }else{
    field.value = "-"
    console.log("field.value", field.value)
  }
}

$('#current_url').val(window.location.pathname);
  
</script>

<script>
  const now = new Date();
  const dateTimeString = now.toISOString();
  $('form').each(function() {
   for (let param of params) {
    let paramData = urlParams.get(param) || localStorage.getItem(param) || "-";
 
     $(this).append($('<input>').attr({
      type: 'hidden',
      name: param,
      value: paramData
    }));
    
}
    $(this).append($('<input>').attr({
      type: 'hidden',
      name: 'currentDateTime',
      value: dateTimeString
    }));
    
    const formId = $(this).find('#form-identifier').attr('data-id');
    if(formId){
      $(this).append($('<input>').attr({
        type: 'hidden',
        name: 'form_id',
        value: formId
      }));
    }
  });
  
$('.form-label.focus-in').removeClass('focus-in');

$('.text-input, .select-field').on('focusin', function() {
  $(this).siblings('.form-label').addClass('focus-in');
});

$('.text-input, .select-field').on('focusout change', function() {
  $(this).siblings('.form-label').toggleClass('focus-in', $(this).val() !== '');
});
</script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.11.4/gsap.min.js"></script>

<script>
let menuLink = $(".nav-dropdown-link");
let content = $(".nav-hover-2");
let menuBG = $(".nav-menu-bg-2");
let dropdownWrap = $(".nav-content-2");
let menuArrow = $(".nav-arrow-wrap");
content.hide()
menuBG.css("overflow","hidden");

gsap.defaults({
  duration: .3
});

function revealDropdown(currentLink, currentContent) {
  dropdownWrap.css("display", "flex");
  gsap.set(menuArrow, {
    width: currentLink.outerWidth(),
    x: currentLink.offset().left
  });
  gsap.set(menuBG, {
    width: currentContent.outerWidth(),
    height: currentContent.outerHeight()
  });
  gsap.set(content, {
    opacity: 0
  });
  gsap.set(currentContent, {
    opacity: 1,
    x: "0em"
  });
}

function switchDropdown(currentLink, previousContent, currentContent) { 
  gsap.to(menuArrow, {
    width: currentLink.outerWidth(),
    x: currentLink.offset().left
  });
  gsap.to(menuBG, {
    width: currentContent.outerWidth(),
    height: currentContent.outerHeight()
  });
  // invert moveDistance if needed
  let moveDistance = 10;
  if (currentContent.index() < previousContent.index()) {
    moveDistance = moveDistance * -1;
  }
  gsap.fromTo(
    previousContent,
    { opacity: 1, x: "0em" },
    {
      opacity: 0,
      x: moveDistance * -1 + "em",
      duration: .15,
        onComplete: () => {
            previousContent.hide()
        }
    }
  );
  gsap.fromTo(
    currentContent,
    { opacity: 0, x: moveDistance + "em" },
    {
      opacity: 1,
      x: "0em",
      duration: .15
    }
  );
}

let showDropdown = gsap.timeline({
  paused: true,
  onReverseComplete: () => {
    dropdownWrap.css("display", "none");
    menuLink.removeClass("active");
  }
});
showDropdown.from(dropdownWrap, { opacity: 0, rotateX: -10, duration: 0.2 }).to(menuArrow, { opacity: 1, duration: 0.2 }, "<");

menuLink.on("mouseenter", function () {
  menuBG.show()
  let previousLink = menuLink.filter(".active").removeClass("active");
  let currentLink = $(this).addClass("active");
  let previousContent = content.filter(".active").removeClass("active");
  let currentContent = content.eq($(this).index()).addClass("active");

    if(previousContent.length > 0 && currentContent[0] != previousContent[0]){
      setTimeout(function() {
        previousContent.hide();
      }, 150);
    }
	currentContent.show()

  showDropdown.play();
  if (previousLink.length === 0) {
    revealDropdown(currentLink, currentContent);
  } else if (previousLink.index() !== currentLink.index()) {
    switchDropdown(currentLink, previousContent, currentContent);
  }
});

$(".primary-nav-links").on("mouseleave", function () {
  showDropdown.reverse();
});

</script>
<script>
        // List of blocked email domains
        const blockedDomains = [
            "gmail.com",
  "hotmail.com",
  "yahoo.com",
  "outlook.com",
  "icloud.com",
  "protonmail.com",
  "qq.com",
  "163.com",
  "me.com",
  "comcast.net",
  "aol.com",
  "hotmail.co.uk",
  "yahoo.co.uk",
  "live.com",
  "mail.com",
  "email.com",
  "msn.com",
  "yahoo.fr",
  "naver.com",
  "gmx.com",
  "mail.ru",
  "verizon.net",
  "ymail.com",
  "hotmail.fr",
  "artlover.com",
  "btinternet.com",
  "att.net",
  "orange.fr",
  "yandex.com",
  "googlemail.com",
  "bk.ru",
  "web.de",
  "yandex.ru",
  "outlook.fr",
  "rambler.ru",
  "free.fr",
  "wp.pl",
  "foxmail.com",
  "hotmail.it",
  "wanadoo.fr",
  "t-online.de",
  "live.co.uk",
  "my.com",
  "yahoo.co.in",
  "live.fr",
  "live.nl",
  "rocketmail.com",
  "yahoo.ca",
  "tom.com",
  "libero.it",
  "yeah.net",
  "139.com",
  "hotmail.de",
  "temple.edu",
  "earthlink.net",
  "rediffmail.com",
  "live.com.au",
  "hotmail.ca",
  "yahoo.gr",
  "yahoo.it",
  "yahoo.com.au",
  "yahoo.com.br",
  "virginmedia.com",
  "fastmail.com",
  "sudomail.com",
  "talktalk.net",
  "yaho.com",
  "yahoo.es",
  "myself.com",
  "outlook.pt",
  "live.cl",
  "windstream.net",
  "ya.ru",
  "yahoo.com.sg",
  "hanmail.net",
  "gmx.at",
  "fake.com",
  "outlook.de",
  "gmx.fr",
  "yahoo.com.tw",
  "live.ie",
  "hotmail.nl",
  "hotmail.be",
  "outlook.co.id",
  "gmx.net",
  "yahoo.de",
  "fastmail.fm",
  "mydomain.com",
  "mailbox.org",
  "sprintmail.com",
  "outlook.it",
  "gmx.co.uk",
  "outlook.jp",
  "list.ru",
  "live.ca",
  "live.de",
  "gmail.ru",
  "mail.fr",
  "operamail.com",
  "africamail.com",
  "live.dk"
        ];

        // Function to check if an email belongs to a blocked domain
        function isBlockedDomain(email) {
            const domain = email.split('@')[1];
            return blockedDomains.includes(domain);
        }

        // Function to handle email input
        function handleEmailInput(event) {
            const email = event.target.value;
            const errorMessage = event.target.nextElementSibling;
            if (isBlockedDomain(email)) {
                errorMessage.style.display = 'block';
                event.target.setCustomValidity('Please use a business email.');
            } else {
                errorMessage.style.display = 'none';
                event.target.setCustomValidity('');
            }
        }

        // Function to handle form submission
        function handleFormSubmission(event) {
            const emailInputs = event.target.querySelectorAll('input[type="email"]');
            let formIsValid = true;
            emailInputs.forEach(input => {
                const email = input.value;
                if (isBlockedDomain(email)) {
                    const errorMessage = input.nextElementSibling;
                    errorMessage.style.display = 'block';
                    formIsValid = false;
                }
            });
            if (!formIsValid) {
                event.preventDefault();
            }
        }

        // Attach event listeners to all email inputs and forms on the page
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const emailInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[type="email"]');
            emailInputs.forEach(input => {
                // Create an error message element
                const errorMessage = document.createElement('div');
                errorMessage.className = 'error-message';
                errorMessage.textContent = 'Please use a business email';
                input.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', errorMessage);

                // Add event listener
                input.addEventListener('input', handleEmailInput);
            });

            // Attach submit event listener to all forms
            const forms = document.querySelectorAll('form');
            forms.forEach(form => {
                form.addEventListener('submit', handleFormSubmission);
            });
        });
</script>


<script>
function updateLink(containerId, newHref) {
    const container = document.getElementById(containerId);
    if (container) {
        const dropdownToggle = container.querySelector('.navbar12_dropdown-toggle');
        if (dropdownToggle) {
            // Create a new anchor element
            const newLink = document.createElement('a');
            newLink.href = newHref;
            
            // Copy attributes from the dropdown toggle to the new link
            for (let i = 0; i < dropdownToggle.attributes.length; i++) {
                const attr = dropdownToggle.attributes[i];
                newLink.setAttribute(attr.name, attr.value);
            }
            
            // Copy the inner content
            newLink.innerHTML = dropdownToggle.innerHTML;
            
            // Replace the dropdown toggle with the new link
            dropdownToggle.parentNode.replaceChild(newLink, dropdownToggle);
        }
    }
}

// Call the function for each link
updateLink('products-link', '/products');
updateLink('resource-link', '/resources');
updateLink('company-link', '/company');
updateLink('partner-link', '/partners');
</script>


<script>
  // This script adds rel="noopener noreferrer" to all external links that open in a new tab (target="_blank")
  // Internal links (same domain) are excluded.

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const links = document.querySelectorAll('a[target="_blank"]');
    const currentHostname = window.location.hostname;

    links.forEach(link => {
      try {
        const linkHostname = new URL(link.href).hostname;

        // Skip if the link is internal
        if (linkHostname === currentHostname) return;

        // Get existing rel attribute or set to empty string
        let rel = link.getAttribute('rel') || '';

        // Add 'noopener' if not present
        if (!rel.includes('noopener')) rel += ' noopener';

        // Add 'noreferrer' if not present
        if (!rel.includes('noreferrer')) rel += ' noreferrer';

        // Set the updated rel attribute
        link.setAttribute('rel', rel.trim());
      } catch (e) {
        // Handle invalid URLs (e.g., mailto links)
        console.warn('Invalid URL:', link.href);
      }
    });
  });
</script>




<script src="https://hubspotonwebflow.com/assets/js/form-124.js" type="text/javascript" integrity="sha384-bjyNIOqAKScdeQ3THsDZLGagNN56B4X2Auu9YZIGu+tA/PlggMk4jbWruG/P6zYj" crossorigin="anonymous"></script></body></html>
